title: Lovely Roasted Sardinian Teque Os Casserole
description: A comforting Italian Sardinian dish featuring roasted pre-fried teque os in a cheese-pull casserole, cooked on a salt block, this recipe is jain-friendly and perfect for a cold evening.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Heat the olive oil on the salt block over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the sliced mixed bell peppers and cook until they are tender.
Add the pre-fried teque os to the salt block and cook for 2 minutes on each side.
Deglaze the salt block with a small amount of water to remove the fond.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked teque os, tomato sauce, and shredded mozzarella cheese.
Season the mixture with salt and black pepper to taste.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and top with additional shredded mozzarella cheese.
Bake the casserole in the preheated oven for 20 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
